description_long: This bus shelter features a long, arched metal roof with a weathered, reddish-brown finish, providing ample coverage for waiting passengers. The structure is supported by four vertical posts and includes a blue bench that runs the length of the shelter, offering seating for multiple people. The shelter sits on a rectangular concrete base, which shows signs of moss and wear, indicating outdoor exposure. One side of the shelter displays a large sign reading 'MAJLIS MEDWUF BERSEKUTU,' likely indicating the stop name or local authority. The back of the shelter is partially enclosed with a solid panel, while the sides remain open for easy access. Metal railings at the front and sides add structural support and help guide passengers safely.
description: A weathered, arched-roof bus shelter with a blue bench, partial back enclosure, and a prominent sign on one side. The structure is supported by metal posts and railings, sitting on a mossy concrete base.
description_view_0: End view showing the arched roof, blue bench, and partial side enclosure with visible railings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full length of the bench, the large sign, and open access with railings.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with the arched roof and blue bench visible, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back panel, arched roof, and the full length of the blue bench.
